info.title: Uno Version Checker
info.description:
Checking website at address --help/.
Unable to read uno config: System.Net.Http.HttpRequestException: Name or service not known (--help:443)
---> System.Net.Sockets.SocketException (0xFFFDFFFF): Name or service not known
